name: Can I sue my boss if I was exposed to toxic fumes at work in Boise?
description: File workers' comp first; sue third parties if applicable, not employer directly.[2][5]

mainEntity.name: Can I sue my boss if I was exposed to toxic fumes at work in Boise?

acceptedAnswer.text: File workers' comp first; sue third parties if applicable, not employer directly.[2][5]
acceptedAnswer.description: **In most cases, you cannot sue your employer directly but can file a workers' compensation claim; third-party suits are possible if another party is negligent.** Workers' comp is the exclusive remedy for job-related injuries in Idaho and Utah, providing no-fault benefits.[5][2] Factors: employer negligence like missing PPE, long-term vs. acute exposure, provable causation. Report to OSHA, gather medical records, avoid signing insurer releases hastily. Consider a lawyer for complex toxic cases.
